site.title: Public Digit
site.description: Secure digital voting platform for diaspora communities, organisations, and NGOs worldwide. GDPR-compliant, end-to-end encrypted online elections.

home.title: Secure Digital Voting | Public Digit Elections
home.description: Empower your organisation with secure, transparent online voting. Public Digit offers GDPR-compliant elections for diaspora communities, NGOs, and membership organisations worldwide.
home.keywords: online voting, digital elections, secure voting, diaspora elections, NRNA

security.title: Secure & Anonymous Online Voting for Associations | Public Digit
security.description: Five-layer security architecture protecting your elections. Complete voter anonymity, cryptographic verification, and multi-tenant isolation for associations, NGOs, and organisations.
security.keywords: secure online voting, anonymous voting, voting associations, election security, digital voting platform, voter anonymity, secure elections, voting for nonprofits

votingSecurity.title: Five-Layer Security Architecture for Secure Online Voting | Public Digit
votingSecurity.description: Conduct secure elections with Public Digit's five-layer security architecture. Complete voter anonymity, cryptographic verification, device fingerprinting, and multi-tenant isolation. GDPR-compliant end-to-end encrypted voting.
votingSecurity.keywords: secure online voting, election security, cryptographic voting, device fingerprinting, voter anonymity, secure elections online, multi-layer security, voting platform security, encrypted voting system, election integrity

demo-guide.title: Online Voting Demo Guide — Public & Organisation Demo | Public Digit
demo-guide.description: Try our secure anonymous online election demo in 5 steps. No registration needed for the public demo. Organisation demo sends your code by email. 100% GDPR compliant, fully anonymous, verifiable.
demo-guide.keywords: online voting demo, demo election, public demo election, organisation voting demo, secure online voting, anonymous voting system, how to vote online, election verification, vote anonymously, online election demo free, test online election, demo voting platform, secure election software, GDPR compliant voting, anonymous ballot online, voting code email, online election guide

tutorials.election-settings.description: Learn how to configure every election setting on Public Digit: IP restrictions, ballot options, selection constraints, voter verification, and more. Step-by-step admin guide.

tutorials.membership-modes.description: Understand Full Membership and Election-Only modes for your organisation. Learn when to use each mode, how they differ, and how to switch between them without losing data.

elections.voters.import.tutorial.description: Master voter importing for elections on Public Digit. Learn Full Membership vs Election-Only modes, CSV formats, bulk registration, step-by-step import process, and auto-create voter accounts.

about.title: About Public Digit
about.subtitle: Empowering Democracy Through Secure Digital Voting
about.mission_text: Public Digit is dedicated to making secure, transparent, and accessible voting available to organisations, NGOs, and diaspora communities worldwide. We believe in the power of digital democracy while maintaining the highest standards of security, privacy, and compliance.
about.vision_text: A world where every organisation, regardless of size or location, can conduct fair, transparent, and secure elections using cutting-edge technology. We envision digital voting as a standard practice that increases participation, reduces costs, and enhances democratic processes.

why_public_digit.title: Maximum Security
why_public_digit.description: GDPR-compliant, BSI IT-Grundschutz certified, and built with military-grade end-to-end encryption to protect every vote.

why_public_digit.title: Complete Transparency
why_public_digit.description: Full audit trails, voter verification, and public result verification ensure total transparency in the voting process.

why_public_digit.title: Global Reach
why_public_digit.description: Support for diaspora communities worldwide with multi-language and multi-timezone capabilities for seamless participation.

why_public_digit.title: Easy to Use
why_public_digit.description: Intuitive interface designed for both administrators and voters, requiring no special technical knowledge or software installation.

why_public_digit.title: Cost-Effective
why_public_digit.description: Significantly reduce election costs compared to physical voting while eliminating geographical and logistical constraints.

why_public_digit.title: Proven Technology
why_public_digit.description: Battle-tested platform serving organisations across Europe and supporting thousands of successful elections.

about.how_it_works_text: Public Digit streamlines the entire voting process from setup to results. Organizations can create elections, manage voter lists, configure ballot options, and conduct voting—all from our secure web platform. Voters participate through their mobile devices or computers with a simple login process. Our system automatically generates audit trails and provides real-time result verification.
about.technology_text: Public Digit is built on modern, scalable technology designed for reliability and performance. We use Laravel for the backend, Vue 3 for the frontend, and PostgreSQL for data persistence. Our infrastructure is hosted in Germany, complying with strict European data protection requirements.
about.team_text: Public Digit is developed by a dedicated team of security experts, software engineers, and democratic process specialists. We're committed to continuous improvement and staying at the forefront of secure digital voting technology.
about.contact_text: Interested in learning more about Public Digit? We're here to help with demonstrations, technical consultations, and custom solutions for your organisation.
about.testimonial_text: Public Digit has transformed how our organisation conducts elections. The process is secure, transparent, and our members love the convenience of voting from anywhere in the world.
